title: Trusted Machine Guarding Solutions - Guardomation

hero.title: Machine Guarding Solutions
hero.subtitle: Providing Machine Guarding Products, Sales, Service, Machine Safeguarding Assessments, Components, & More

h1: Trusted machine guarding and device distributors
intro:
Guardomation, Inc. was established in 1999 with one goal in mind – to help make the manufacturing environment a safer workplace.

Over the years, we have assisted thousands of customers with their machine safety/machine guarding efforts. We specialize in the proper specification and selection of machine guards, guarding devices and safety control systems for your machinery. We represent the top tier manufacturers of machine guards, guarding devices and controllers and apply a customized guarding approach that best fits the needs of our customers.

title: Machine Safety Services
h1: Machine Safety Guarding Services Offered by Guardomation

sections.body: Guardomation can provide written proposals for any machine guarding application or safety system service for your specific machinery and processes. Our team will assess your needs and respond with a customized proposal.

Guardomation can customize, build and install barrier guarding for all types of machinery and hazardous areas. We can also specify and implement presence sensing and/or fixed and interlock barrier guarding solutions on your factory floor.

sections.h2: Stop Time / Safe Distance Analysis for Proper Presence Sensing Device Placement
sections.body: Determining the safe mounting distance of optoelectronics guarding systems such as light safety curtains can be complex. Our experienced staff has been providing stop-time reporting services to its valued customers for over 24 years. Utilizing the Semelex II Safetimer, our staff can perform stop-time analysis tests on many processes, including those with linear and rotational motions.
Guardomation can schedule employee training and safety seminars customized to fit your needs.
